title: 'Eylown #0356
definition:
Elon = "terebinth, mighty"

 1) Hittite, father-in-law of Esau
 2) second son of Zebulun
 3) Zebulonite judge of Israel
 4) town in Dan
nasbUsage:
Definition: Elon = "terebinth, mighty"

 1) Hittite, father-in-law of Esau
 2) second son of Zebulun
 3) Zebulonite judge of Israel
 4) town in Dan

    NASB:  terebinth, an Isr. name, also a Hittite, also a city in Dan
